epic.name: Security Basics
epic.objective: Implement foundational security measures appropriate for v0.1
epic.definition_of_done: Basic security headers set, input validation in place, no secrets in logs, Slack signature verification implemented

tasks.name: Implement security headers middleware
tasks.description: Add standard security headers to all responses

tasks.name: Implement input validation for all endpoints
tasks.description: Validate and sanitize all incoming data
acceptance_criteria: Max request body size enforced (1MB for webhooks)
String fields have max length validation
SQL injection prevented via parameterized queries (GORM)
XSS prevented via proper JSON encoding

tasks.name: Implement Slack request signature verification
tasks.description: Verify Slack requests are authentic using signing secret
acceptance_criteria: X-Slack-Signature header verified on Slack callbacks
Verification can be disabled for development

subtasks.name: Research Slack signature verification algorithm
subtasks.description: Document the HMAC-SHA256 verification process Slack uses

tasks.name: Audit logging for sensitive operations
acceptance_criteria: Log incident status changes with actor
Logs include IP address where applicable
